doctor_turn: What brings you in?
patient_turn: Well, I've had this cough but the biggest issue is that I've been really short of breath.

doctor_turn: OK, when did the cough start?
patient_turn: I would say about 3 days ago.

doctor_turn: Three days ago, OK, and uh, around that time did you also start feeling short of breath?
patient_turn: Uh, the shortness of breath has come on, I don't know within the last day or so. It's come on after that, the cough started first.

doctor_turn: OK, and the cough, is it a dry cough or is it a wet cough?
patient_turn: Well, I've been bringing up some yellowish green, kind of like phlegm, so um I guess a wet cough.

patient_turn: Yeah.

doctor_turn: OK, any blood in the sputum?
patient_turn: I haven't noticed any blood.

doctor_turn: OK, and how much sputum are you coughing up each time? Like is it kind of the size of your fingertip or does it fill your whole palm?
patient_turn: Um, yeah, probably more like the size of like a thumb tip.

patient_turn: Nothing like that I noticed.

doctor_turn: OK, and if you were to describe the sound of your cough, does it sound like it's barky or like a hacking cough?

doctor_turn: OK yeah, um yeah, that doesn't sound great in terms of your shortness of breath. Do you find that certain positions make it worse? Or like exerting yourself makes it worse?

doctor_turn: OK. And how about um, muscle aches or any sort of body aches?

doctor_turn: OK, and do you ever feel like your heart's racing?

doctor_turn: OK, and how about changes to your bowel movements?
patient_turn: No, those have been normal. I haven't had any diarrhea or constipation.

doctor_turn: OK and no blood in your stool?
patient_turn: I haven't noticed any blood, no.

doctor_turn: OK, how about abdominal pains?
patient_turn: Oh yeah, I don't know why, yeah, my belly's been a bit achy maybe.

doctor_turn: OK, and how about a sore throat?
patient_turn: No, my throat felt OK.

doctor_turn: OK, good and have you experienced any loss of taste?
patient_turn: No loss of taste, but I've noticed, yeah, my smell has been kind of funny.

doctor_turn: Your smell has been kind of funny, like you can't smell or do things smell differently than you expect them to?
patient_turn: Yeah, there was a candle on earlier today and I guess I couldn't really smell it, so I guess I haven't been able to smell.

doctor_turn: Do you have a runny nose or a blocked nose?
patient_turn: No, I haven't had to blow my nose or anything.

doctor_turn: OK, any changes in your vision or hearing?
patient_turn: No, that's been normal.

doctor_turn: OK, any discharge or pain in your eyes or ears?

patient_turn: No, I haven't had any pain or anything like that.

doctor_turn: OK, and are you otherwise healthy? Do you have any medical conditions?
